differential_diagnoses: Adjustment disorder with mixed anxiety and depressed mood
next_steps: Comprehensive risk assessment for harm to self and infant
Initiate voluntary psychiatric hospitalization for intensive stabilization and observation
Optimize pharmacotherapy (e.g., transition to appropriate SSRI dose or addition of augmentation agent)
Implement Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) with Exposure and Response Prevention (ERP) for intrusive thoughts
Provide psychoeducation to the patient and family regarding the nature of ego-dystonic intrusive thoughts in postpartum OCD
Coordinate care with the obstetric team to ensure monitoring of postpartum hypertension
Social support and caregiver burden assessment

differential_diagnoses: Postpartum adjustment disorder with mixed anxiety and depressed mood
Postpartum thyroiditis manifesting as anxiety/mood disturbance
Postpartum psychosis (ruled out via clinical presentation, but critical to monitor)
next_steps: Comprehensive risk assessment for harm to self and infant
Initiate voluntary psychiatric hospitalization for intensive stabilization, monitoring, and safety
Psychoeducation for the patient and spouse regarding the nature of ego-dystonic intrusive thoughts in postpartum OCD
Pharmacotherapy optimization: transition to a therapeutic dose of a selective serotonin reuptake inhibitor (SSRI)
Initiate Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) specifically focusing on Exposure and Response Prevention (ERP)
Laboratory investigation to rule out medical mimics, including thyroid function tests and comprehensive metabolic panel
Ongoing coordination with the obstetric team to ensure effective management of postpartum hypertension
Formal assessment of home support systems and caregiver burden
